Base Offset:

Size:

Source:

Contents

Bits Identifier Access Reset Decoded Name
[31] noc_nsp_clken rw 0x1 noc_nsp_clk gate enable

[28:20] - - - -
[19:4] noc_wdref_divsor rw 0x1 0,1=no div; n=n div
